blocks.name: billing-contracts
blocks.title: Billing Contracts
blocks.purpose: Provider-neutral billing DTOs, resource states, and precision-safe formatters.

blocks.name: billing-ui
blocks.title: Billing UI Helpers
blocks.purpose: Shared billing formatting and presentation helpers.

blocks.name: billing-pricing-table
blocks.title: Billing Pricing Table
blocks.purpose: Responsive plan comparison and interval selection.

blocks.name: billing-subscription-card
blocks.title: Billing Subscription Card
blocks.purpose: Current-plan, subscription, provider, and payment summary.

blocks.name: billing-entitlements-list
blocks.title: Billing Entitlements List
blocks.purpose: Plan features, caps, quotas, and metered allowances.

blocks.name: billing-usage-overview
blocks.title: Billing Usage Overview
blocks.purpose: Current-period usage, allowance, credit pool, and overage states.

blocks.name: billing-credits-card
blocks.title: Billing Credits Card
blocks.purpose: Available credits grouped by compatible meter and unit.

blocks.name: billing-usage-history
blocks.title: Billing Usage History
blocks.purpose: Accessible, filterable, and paginated usage history.

blocks.name: billing-activity-table
blocks.title: Billing Activity Table
blocks.purpose: Filterable billing ledger activity with metadata details.

blocks.name: billing-settings-page
blocks.title: Billing Settings Page
blocks.purpose: Router-neutral composition of the customer billing blocks.

blocks.name: feature-pack-data
blocks.title: Data Feature Pack
blocks.purpose: Versioned _meta-driven table exploration and spreadsheet CRUD.

blocks.name: feature-pack-auth
blocks.title: Authentication Feature Pack
blocks.purpose: Provider-neutral authentication and personal account management.

blocks.name: feature-pack-users
blocks.title: App access Feature Pack
blocks.purpose: Application member governance, lifecycle controls, invitations, access profiles, direct permission grants, and defaults.

blocks.name: feature-pack-organizations
blocks.title: Organizations Feature Pack
blocks.purpose: Tenant switching, member governance, invitations, profiles, permissions, defaults, hierarchy, settings, principals, and API keys.

blocks.name: feature-pack-storage
blocks.title: Storage Feature Pack
blocks.purpose: Bucket, folder, object, upload, download, and deletion surfaces.

blocks.name: feature-pack-billing
blocks.title: Billing Feature Pack
blocks.purpose: Feature-pack root for plans, subscriptions, usage, credits, and activity.

blocks.name: feature-pack-notifications
blocks.title: Notifications Feature Pack
blocks.purpose: Application notification inbox and message actions.

blocks.name: console-kit-core
blocks.title: Constructive Console Kit Core
blocks.purpose: Leaf-independent shell, runtime, discovery, and modular Zustand store.

blocks.name: preset-auth-hardened
blocks.title: Hardened Authentication Preset
blocks.purpose: Maps auth:hardened to data, authentication, and users.

blocks.name: preset-b2b-storage
blocks.title: B2B with Storage Preset
blocks.purpose: Maps b2b:storage to data, authentication, users, organizations, and storage.

blocks.name: preset-full
blocks.title: Full Preset
blocks.purpose: Maps the full backend preset to all seven feature packs.

blocks.name: console-kit-nextjs
blocks.title: Constructive Console Kit for Next.js
blocks.purpose: Full-page Next.js console with semantic routing, dynamic tenant discovery, every feature pack, and one modular per-instance Zustand store.
